_meta.source: Forex Factory screenshots — weeks of Jun 22-26 + Jun 28-Jul 4 + Jul 5-10, 2026
_meta.note: Manually added because FF JSON API was missing CAD events for this week. Times are EST and converted to UTC via offset (EDT = UTC-4 in June/July).
_meta.instructions: Add events from FF screenshots here. Date should be ISO 8601 UTC. Use format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:00.000Z. EST/EDT events: add 4 hours for EDT, 5 for EST. Filter: RED flag = High, ORANGE = Medium, skip yellow.
